title: Mopro: Powering Noir on Mobile | NoirCon 3 Devconnect 2025
description:
A practical workshop on building ZK mobile apps in the Noir ecosystem.

Moven Tsai introduces Mopro and shows how to build mobile applications using Noir circuits and the Barretenberg backend, highlighting the features that make Noir + bb well-suited for mobile ZK development.
